name: Sausage and Beans with Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them into chunks, similar to what you would use for stew.
2. Place the potato chunks in the bottom of your crockpot.
3. Peel and slice the onions, then lay them on top of the potatoes.
4. Wash and prepare the green beans by washing and cutting them into desired lengths.
5. Place the prepared green beans on top of the onions.
6. Add approximately 1 cup of water to the crockpot.
7. Slice the smoked sausage into slices or four large portions, then place on top of the green beans.
8. Set the crockpot to a medium setting and cook for approximately 8 hours.
This turns into a delicious one pot meal perfect for a busy day.
